title: Review Comment
description: Anchored review comment produced by the Working Paper Review Engine from a numbered PDF working paper. Comments must be anchored to a specific section, page, and — where determinable — the visible left-margin line number printed on the PDF page.

comment_id.description: Stable identifier for the comment within a run.

source_run_id.description: Identifier linking the comment to a review run manifest.

reviewer_persona_id.description: Identifier of the persona that produced the comment.

reviewer_initials.description: Compact reviewer attribution used in the canonical matrix Reviewer Initials column.

agency.description: Submitting agency, mapped to the canonical matrix Agency column.

section_id.description: Document section number or title derived from visible headings in the PDF.

page_reference.description: Page number of the PDF on which the comment is anchored.

line.description: Visible left-margin line number(s) on the PDF page. Allowed formats: single number ('42'), range ('42-45'), or list ('42, 46'). Leave blank only when the line number is genuinely unresolvable; never infer from paragraph position.

anchor_text.description: Exact text snippet from the PDF that the comment references.

comment_category.description: Taxonomy category (e.g., technical sufficiency, reproducibility, regulatory ambiguity).

comment_type.description: Canonical Comment Type value from the spectrum-systems spreadsheet contract. Must be one of: Editorial/Grammar, Clarification, Technical.

comment_text.description: Primary comment content describing the issue.

rationale.description: Reasoning that ties the comment to the anchor and persona concerns.

suggested_revision.description: Actionable guidance or proposed replacement language to address the issue.

confidence.description: Model or reviewer confidence score between 0 and 1.

deduplication_key.description: Optional normalized key to aid duplicate detection.

metadata.description: Optional additional context (e.g., model version, prompt template).
